pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.5 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace Jersey starter with Mail starter to support email functionality instead of JAX-RS.
Add Spring Security starter to enable authentication and authorization features.
Add Flyway core dependency for database migration management.
Add H2 database dependency for in-memory database support.
Pin PostgreSQL driver version to 42.7.4 for compatibility.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT support.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization in JWT.
Add javax.servlet-api dependency for servlet API compatibility.
Add Auth0 Java JWT dependency for additional JWT utilities.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter for bean validation support.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for API documentation generation.
Replace deprecated OAuth2 autoconfigure with ModelMapper for object mapping.
Add Flyway Maven plugin for automated database migrations.

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence import with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3/JDK 21.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class must use jakarta.persistence.

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Refactor controller to use constructor injection and introduce a service layer for business logic separation.
Update endpoint mapping and response types to use DTOs and ResponseEntity for standardized REST responses.
Add CRUD endpoints (POST, PUT, DELETE) to complete the REST controller functionality.
Simplify CrossOrigin annotation by removing explicit origins, relying on default or global configuration.
Replace legacy java.sql.Date with java.time.LocalDate for date fields to align with modern Java date/time API standards.
Change primary key generation strategy from database auto-increment (IDENTITY) to UUID to support distributed or non-sequential ID generation.
Add explicit table name mapping using @Table annotation to ensure consistent database table naming.
Add @Column(nullable = false) annotations to enforce non-null constraints at the JPA level for critical fields.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.before:
private String nome;
private LocalDate data_inicio_contrato;

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Replace @AllArgsConstructor with @NoArgsConstructor and a custom constructor to allow JPA entity instantiation while controlling field initialization.
Add @Setter(AccessLevel.NONE) to the ID field to prevent accidental modification of the primary key after generation.
Change the primary key type of the Cliente entity from Long to UUID in the repository interface.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.why_exists: Type mismatch compile error if the Cliente entity's ID field is defined as UUID but the repository expects Long.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.before: public interface ClienteRepository extends JpaRepository<Cliente, Long>{
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.after: public interface ClienteRepository extends JpaRepository<Cliente, UUID> {

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Add a custom JPQL query method to check for client existence by name ignoring case.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.after:
@Query("SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(i) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM Cliente i WHERE LOWER(i.nome) = LOWER(:nome)")
    boolean existsByNomeIgnoreCase(@Param("nome") String nome);

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Updated database connection URL to reflect a new database name.
Updated database password to a new value.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto mode from create-drop to validate for production safety.
Removed explicit SQL show property in favor of Hibernate specific properties.
Removed explicit Hibernate dialect configuration, relying on auto-detection.
Removed static resource path pattern configuration.
Enabled Flyway for database migration management.
Enabled Flyway baseline on migrate for existing databases.
Enabled SQL formatting in Hibernate logs.
Enabled SQL display in Hibernate logs.
